title: NOVERIS Landscape Concept Art Pack 20 Vol. 2
styleGuide: NOVERIS space scenes: retro-futurist sci-fi concept art, dark cinematic atmosphere, blue-black space, warm amber civilization light, subtle orbital diagrams, painterly premium game key-art finish, minimal editorial composition.

prompts.title: Eclipse Caravan
prompts.prompt: A caravan of small colony ships crossing the shadow of a total solar eclipse above a blue-black planet, amber engine trails, faint orbital route arcs, luminous corona behind the planet, premium retro-futurist NOVERIS concept art, wide 16:9, no text, no logo, no watermark.
